name: Spotlight
summary: An SVG-based spotlight overlay component that creates an animated elliptical glow effect for hero sections.
detailedDescription: Spotlight is an SVG overlay component that creates a dramatic elliptical spotlight effect using Gaussian blur filters. The component renders a large ellipse (1924px radius) with a fill opacity of 0.21, positioned at an angle using a transform matrix. The ellipse is filtered through a Gaussian blur with a 151px standard deviation, creating a soft, diffused glow. The SVG is sized at 169% height and 138% width (84% on large screens) to ensure full coverage, and uses the 'animate-spotlight' CSS class for entrance animation. The spotlight fill color is configurable via props, defaulting to white. The component uses pointer-events-none to allow interaction with content underneath, and positions itself absolutely with z-index 1. This creates a subtle atmospheric lighting effect that draws attention to hero content without overwhelming the text or interactive elements. Best used as a decorative layer in hero sections to add depth and visual interest.
purpose: Add atmospheric lighting effects to hero sections
Create visual depth with soft elliptical glows
Enhance hero content with subtle decorative illumination
behavior: Renders as absolute positioned SVG overlay
Applies Gaussian blur filter to elliptical shape
Animates in via CSS animate-spotlight class
Uses configurable fill color for customization
Allows pointer events to pass through to content below
Scales responsively based on screen size
visualCharacteristics: Soft elliptical glow with blur effect
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
